HomePage.title: One Trace
HomePage.description: Trace and manage your work in one place.

Auth.title: Welcome back
Auth.subtitle: Sign in to your account to continue.

errors.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

register.title: Create account
register.body: Registration will live here — wire your API next.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.body: Password reset will live here — wire your API next.

ApiErrors.NETWORK: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
ApiErrors.fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ApiErrors.HTTP_500: The server had a problem. Please try again later.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist.

settingsNav.title: Settings
settingsNav.hint: Customize theme and accent for this workspace.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.subtitle: Control theme, language, and accent for the dashboard shell. Accent colors highlight navigation and the header stripe.
appearance.themeHint: Switch between a bright interface and a dark interface.
appearance.languageHint: Updates all dashboard and settings labels for your account on this device.
appearance.accentHint: Choose a preset or define your own hex color. Active routes and the top stripe use this accent.
appearance.customHint: Use a 6-digit hex value (e.g. #2563eb). Custom accents apply to the sidebar, mobile bar, and header stripe.

home.title: Overview
home.body: You are in the app shell. Add widgets, tables, and navigation here.

projects.title: Projects
projects.body: Your projects will appear here. This is the default view after sign-in.

settings.title: Settings
settings.body: Account and workspace settings will go here.
